headline: Assessing Accenture (ACN) After A 33% Slide And Strong Valuation Signals
summary: Wondering if Accenture's current share price reflects its true worth, especially after a tough stretch for many tech and consulting names. Accenture's share price closed at US$193.84, with returns of a 1.6% decline over 7 days, 7.4% decline over 30 days, 25.4% decline year to date, and 33.4% decline over 1 year, which may have some investors reassessing both risk and potential reward. Recent coverage has focused on how large consulting and IT services firms are responding to changing client...

headline: Is Ziff Davis Inc (ZD) One of the Best Performing Cybersecurity Stocks in 2025?
summary: Ziff Davis Inc (NASDAQ:ZD) is among the best performing cybersecurity stocks in 2025. Ziff Davis Inc (NASDAQ:ZD) announced on March 3 that it was looking to generate $1.2 billion in proceeds from the sale of its Connectivity division. This division houses brands like Ookla, RootMetrics, Speedtest, and Downdetector. These businesses help organizations to deliver faster […]

headline: Accenture Buys Spanish AI & Data Firm Keepler: More Upside Ahead?
summary: Accenture snaps up Spain's Keepler to deepen cloud-native AI and data muscle, adding more than 240 specialists to scale ethical, enterprise AI.

headline: EWF Awards to Recognize Top Leaders Transforming Cybersecurity, Risk, and Technology
summary: DENVER, April 08, 2026--The Executive Women’s Forum (EWF), a division of DSG Global, will honor leaders advancing women in cybersecurity, risk, and technology at the 2026 EWF Awards. These awards recognize individuals and organizations driving innovation, fostering inclusive leadership, and expanding opportunities for women across the industry.

summary: MADRID, Spain, April 08, 2026--Accenture has acquired Keepler Data Tech, a Spanish cloud-native AI and data company.
